project_context.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with subtle Archetype 1 (Organic/FMCG context)
project_context.description: Redesigning the List view of 'Design Requests - New' to reduce cognitive overload, consolidate scattered controls, and create a highly scannable, contemporary data table while preserving the existing Kanban board.

layout_hierarchy.page_container: min-h-screen bg-zinc-50 p-4 md:p-8 space-y-6 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto

top_header.description: Consolidates Title, Total Count, and Main Actions into a single crisp row.
top_header.layout: flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4
top_header.left: H1 Title (Cabinet Grotesk) + subdued text-sm badge showing total count.
top_header.right: Flex row gap-3: [List/Kanban Toggle] [Export CSV (Ghost)] [New Request (Primary Button)]

consolidated_toolbar.description: Replaces 3 separate bands (Tabs, 8 Status Pills, 4 Filter Drops) with a single highly functional 'Command Strip'.
consolidated_toolbar.layout: flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-3 p-1.5 bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm items-center

queue_switcher.layout: flex p-1 bg-zinc-100 rounded-md shrink-0 w-full lg:w-auto
queue_switcher.items: All, Raised By Me, Assigned To Me
queue_switcher.style: Active item gets bg-white, shadow-sm, text-zinc-900. Inactive gets text-zinc-500. Include count badges (text-xs) inside each segment.

search_bar.style: Border-none, focus:ring-0, bg-transparent. Search icon (lucide) left aligned. Minimalist, looks like an OS search bar.

status_filter.menu_style: Dropdown with checkboxes for the 8 states, each showing their respective counts right-aligned.

advanced_filters.trigger_style: Ghost button with Lucide Filter icon. If active, show a tiny blue dot indicator.
advanced_filters.menu_style: A popover card containing the 3 remaining dropdowns: Request Type, Assigned Team, Requested By. Includes a 'Clear All' button.

list_view_redesign.container: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden

data_row.style: group border-b border-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-50/80 transition-colors duration-200

columns.name: Request
columns.composition: 2-line layout. Top: Request Title (text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-900). Bottom: Request Number (Mono text-xs text-zinc-500) + Snippet truncate.
columns.indicators: Replace heavy pills with inline icons or micro-badges. 'Urgent' = red flame icon. 'New' = blue dot indicator on the row edge. 'Tight timeline' = amber clock icon.

columns.name: Status
columns.composition: Compact badge: border + subtle bg + text. No massive pills. e.g. px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium.

columns.name: People (Lead / Assignee / Raised By)
columns.composition: Consolidate into Avatar groups or subtle flex rows (Avatar 20px + Name text-sm). Use tooltips for full names if space is tight.

columns.name: Due Date & Age
columns.composition: text-sm. If overdue, text-rose-600 font-semibold. Age shown as '• 4d old' in text-zinc-400.

list_view_redesign.pagination: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-t border-zinc-200 bg-white

kanban_preservation.note: When the List/Kanban toggle is set to Kanban, hide the `list_view_redesign` table and render the existing Kanban board layout exactly as it is, placing it below the new `consolidated_toolbar`.

micro_interactions.hover_states: All buttons use slight background darkens or text-color shifts. Table rows slightly darken (`hover:bg-zinc-50`).
micro_interactions.transitions: Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out` on all interactive elements.

states.empty: A spacious 400px high flex-col center container inside the table body. Uses a Lucide Inbox icon (stroke-1, text-zinc-300 w-12 h-12), bold text 'No requests found', and subdued text 'Adjust your filters or create a new request'.
states.loading: Replace table rows with Shadcn Skeleton rows. 1 height-10 header skeleton, 5 height-16 row skeletons.

iconography.usage: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a contemporary, refined aesthetic. Avoid heavy icons.
